top.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
top.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

top.title: Oil prices rise after US and Iran exchange fire in Hormuz strait
top.summary: US President Donald Trump says the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran is still in place.

top.title: Third British national has suspected hantavirus infection, UK government says
top.summary: The patient is on the remote Atlantic island of Tristan da Cunha, which was visited by the cruise ship in April.

top.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today - what does this mean for your DMs?
top.summary: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
top.summary: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.
